column1: Examples of the voice & style expected
Use these sample passages as style anchors — mirror their blend of warmth

Each raised square — called a 'key' — was assigned one or more symbols. When depressed with sufficient yet not excessive force (a subtlety that took early humans years to master), it sent an electrical signal to the machine. Think of it as tapping a thought, one letter at a time, at roughly 40–80 thoughts per minute.
Problem: Nothing is appearing on screen. Cause: You are likely pressing the key with your mind. Solution: Apply physical fingertip pressure. Yes, physically. We know.
